buy.title: How to Buy a Car from Korea
buy.subtitle: Complete guide through the buying process. We'll walk you through all 8 steps
buy.readyDescription: Choose a car from our catalog and begin your journey to the perfect vehicle

step1.title: Choose a Car
step1.description: Browse our catalog of cars from South Korea. Filter by brand, model, year, and price. Our managers will help you find the perfect option that meets your country's import regulations.

step2.title: Make a Deposit
step2.description: Make a deposit of KRW 2,000,000 toward the car's total cost. We'll reserve the car for you and start preparing the documents.
step2.highlight: All funds are insured and guaranteed to be refunded if the car does not pass the initial inspection.

step3.title: Vehicle Inspection
step3.description: Our specialist performs a full technical inspection of the car in South Korea. You'll receive a detailed photo and video report, including full computer diagnostics and a paint-thickness measurement.

step4.title: Pay the Balance
step4.description: After you approve the report, you pay the remaining cost of the car via international SWIFT transfer based on the issued invoice. We buy the car and prepare it for shipment.

step5.title: Export Processing
step5.description: Our team fully handles deregistering the car in South Korea and preparing all the export documents required to ship it to your country.

step6.title: International Delivery
step6.description: We arrange ocean freight of the car to your destination port under CIF terms (insurance included). You receive a tracking number and a Bill of Lading (B/L) to track your shipment.
step6.highlight: Delivery time depends on the distance to your destination port and the chosen route.

step7.title: Customs Clearance
step7.description: Upon the car's arrival at the destination port, you complete import customs clearance according to your country's laws. We provide a complete package of Korean documents for fast clearance. If needed, we can recommend trusted brokers in your region.

step8.title: Receive Your Car
step8.description: Your car is ready! Once customs procedures are complete, you pick up the car from the warehouse or your broker. All original documents and keys are handed over with the car.
step8.highlight: Congratulations! Your new car is ready for the road.

items.q: Which countries do you ship cars to?
items.a: We export worldwide. Key destinations include the CIS countries (Russia, Kazakhstan, Kyrgyzstan, Belarus), the Middle East, Asia, and Europe. We'll choose the best delivery route to the nearest major sea port to you.

items.q: Who handles customs clearance in my country?
items.a: Our company is responsible for the purchase, inspection, export processing in Korea, and CIF delivery to your country's port. Import customs clearance is handled by the buyer. We prepare a complete, fully compliant set of documents (invoice, export declaration, Bill of Lading) allowing any local broker to clear the vehicle efficiently. In many countries we also have trusted partner brokers we can recommend to you.

items.q: Is the car insured during transport?
items.a: Yes, we ship all cars under CIF terms. This means the delivery cost already includes marine cargo insurance that protects your car throughout the entire journey until it arrives at the destination port.

about.title: K-Axis — your
about.para1: K-Axis specializes in supplying genuine auto parts from South Korea. We work directly with manufacturers and official dealers, ensuring competitive prices and the authenticity of every part.
about.para2: Our mission is to make Korean car repairs accessible and high-quality. We understand how important it is to get the right part on time, so we ensure fast order processing and reliable delivery.
about.adv0desc: We work directly with manufacturers, no middlemen
about.adv2desc: From 7 days to anywhere in the world
